name: Jessica's Marshmallow Clouds
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 325°F. Use fresh marshmallows only.
Combine flour, cocoa, and baking soda in a medium bowl; set aside.
In a large bowl, combine sugars and butter; blend until smooth.
Add eggs and vanilla extract; beat at medium speed until light and fluffy.
Gradually add the flour mixture and chocolate chips; mix on low speed until just combined. The batter will be stiff.
Gently gather 4-5 marshmallows in your hand and cover them with a heaping tablespoon of dough.
Wrap the dough around the marshmallows, completely encasing them to form a 2-inch-diameter ball.
Place balls on ungreased baking sheets, about 2 inches apart. Bake until set, about 15 minutes (was: 20-22 minutes).
Remove from oven and let cool on the pan for 2 minutes before transferring to a cool, flat surface.
